fields.name: transaction_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this salary credit transaction, issued by the Accounts Department

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Date and time when the salary credit transaction was initiated

fields.name: amount
fields.description: The monetary value of the salary credit in the specified currency

fields.name: currency
fields.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the transaction amount

fields.name: employee
fields.description: Details of the employee receiving the salary credit

children.name: employee_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the employee within the organization

children.name: position
children.description: Job title or role of the employee

children.name: personal_account
children.description: Bank account details where the salary credit will be deposited

children.name: sort_code
children.description: UK bank sort code identifying the branch

children.name: bank_name
children.description: Name of the bank where the account is held

fields.name: department_from
fields.description: Details of the originating department (Accounts) initiating the salary credit

children.name: name
children.description: Full name of the originating department

children.name: department_code
children.description: Unique code identifying the originating department

children.name: contact
children.description: Email address or contact point for the originating department

fields.name: department_to
fields.description: Details of the counterparty department (Credit) receiving the transaction notification

children.name: name
children.description: Full name of the counterparty department

children.name: department_code
children.description: Unique code identifying the counterparty department

children.name: contact
children.description: Email address or contact point for the counterparty department

fields.name: authorizer
fields.description: Details of the person who authorized the salary credit transaction

children.name: name
children.description: Full name of the authorizing officer

children.name: employee_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the authorizing officer

children.name: role
children.description: Job title or role of the authorizing officer

fields.name: reference
fields.description: Business reference code linking the transaction to the payroll run and employee

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current processing status of the salary credit transaction

fields.name: settlement_details
fields.description: Information about the settlement and clearing of the salary credit

children.name: initiated_at
children.description: Date and time when the settlement process was initiated

children.name: settled_at
children.description: Date and time when the settlement was completed and funds transferred

children.name: clearing_method
children.description: The payment clearing system or method used to process the transaction

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Free-text notes providing additional context about the salary credit transaction
